name: ts-autocode
description: Train and safely rewrite decorated or directive-marked TypeScript functions.

scripts.build: npm run build:harness && npm run build:rewrite && npm run build:training && npm run build:core
scripts.build:core: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build:harness: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('packages/harness/dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p packages/harness/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:harness && npm run build:rewrite && npm run build:training && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/harness/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/rewrite/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/training/tsconfig.test.json
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build:core
scripts.build:training: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('packages/training/dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p packages/training/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:rewrite: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('packages/rewrite/dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p packages/rewrite/tsconfig.json
